text_introduction.title: Introduction
text_introduction.content:
# Welcome to the Game Guide

This comprehensive guide will help you master every aspect of the game. Whether you're a newcomer looking for basic guidance or a veteran seeking to optimize your playthrough, you'll find everything you need right here.

## Getting Started

- **New Players**: Start with the **Character Creation** section below
- **Returning Players**: Check the **Quick Reference** for key mechanics
- **Experienced Players**: Jump to **Advanced Strategies**

## Guide Navigation

Use the tabs above to navigate between different sections:
- **Characters & Stats**: Complete character information
- **Walkthrough**: Step-by-step progression guide
- **Items & Equipment**: Comprehensive database
- **Side Quests**: Optional content checklist

> **Pro Tip**: Bookmark this guide and use Ctrl+F to quickly find what you need!

text_tips.title: Tips & Tricks
text_tips.content:
# Essential Tips & Tricks

## Combat Tips

- **Perfect Dodge**: Time your dodges just before enemy attacks for invincibility frames
- **Critical Hits**: Most enemies have vulnerable moments after certain attacks
- **Elemental Weaknesses**: Use opposite elements for 2x damage
- **Status Effects**: Poison/Paralyze can turn tough fights into easy wins

## Exploration Tips

- **Save Often**: Multiple save points prevent progress loss
- **Hidden Areas**: Check behind waterfalls and suspicious walls
- **NPC Schedules**: Some characters appear only at specific times
- **Environmental Clues**: Audio/visual cues often hint at secrets

## Efficiency Tips

- **Route Optimization**: Plan your path to minimize backtracking
- **Resource Management**: Don't waste healing items outside of boss fights
- **Experience Farming**: Certain areas give better XP/minute ratios
- **Speedrun Techniques**: Master movement cancel and frame-perfect tricks

## Pro Strategies

> **Boss Pattern**: Most bosses have 3-5 attack patterns before repeating
> **Item Synthesis**: Combine items at the right time for unique gear
> **Level Scaling**: Some areas scale with your level - revisit when overleveled
> **Hidden Mechanics**: The game doesn't tell you everything - experiment!
